Every Peyton Manning TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Search

Peyton Manning has thrown 579 touchdown passes in his NFL career. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways.

TDs by Opponent

TDs by Season

TDs by Week

Peyton Manning has thrown 40 playoff TDs which is about 6.9 % of his total TDs.

TDs by Receiver

Peyton Manning has connected with Marvin Harrison for 114 touchdowns. He's also thrown TDs to 49 other players.

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Peyton Manning has accumulated 11,058 yards. That's more passing yards than Rex Grossman (11,015) threw in his entire career.
